qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral degree in science or master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognized University or equivalent.
qualification.details: Project Scientist-I: Doctoral degree in science or master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognized University or equivalent. Relevant experience gained after the minimum qualifying degree will only be taken into consideration. Minimum requirements of qualifications and/or experience can be relaxed in respect of exceptionally outstanding candidates.

salary_details.details: Project Scientist-I: Rs.77,000/- + HRA Increment of 5% for every 2 years of experience subject to performance review.

selection_process: Short-listing based on online application information Test/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for the Project Scientist-I post at IIT Madras is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Doctoral degree in science or a master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognized University or equivalent. Relevant experience is also considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Scientist-I position will receive a salary of Rs.77,000/- plus HRA. There is also a provision for a 5% increment every two years based on performance.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Scientist-I position at IIT Madras through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Madras Project Scientist-I recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves short-listing candidates based on their online application information, followed by a test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with a Master's degree apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognized University or equivalent are eligible to apply for the Project Scientist-I position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Scientist-I position at IIT Madras is temporary.
